exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your mental health forward
items: Research and compile a list of 3-5 mental health professionals in your area who accept your insurance
Schedule a comprehensive health assessment with your primary care physician to rule out any physical causes for mental health symptoms
Create a daily mood and symptom tracking log for the next two weeks
Complete a comprehensive self-assessment questionnaire about your mental health symptoms and family history
Identify and document your personal mental health warning signs and early intervention strategies
Research and enroll in a mental health first aid or crisis intervention course in your community
